note: Browser-capture fixture. Carnegie's /events is DataDome-protected and JS-rendered, but its data comes from an Algolia index queried by the page's own (referer-authorized) client — a plain server fetch/curl is 403'd. CAPTURE METHOD (run in the connected browser on carnegiehall.org/events): find the `facetedEventSearch` Alpine component, locate the Algolia client inside it (has .search + .appId; appId 'q0tmlopf1j', index 'prod_Events'), then client.search([{indexName:'prod_Events', query:'', params:{hitsPerPage:1000, numericFilters:['startdate>=NOW_MS','startdate<=END_MS'], attributesToRetrieve:['title','startdate','facility','webdisplayperformers','licenseename']}}]). Filter facility to Stern Auditorium / Perelman Stage + Zankel Hall, drop rental-mill licenseenames (MidAmerica, Manhattan Concert Productions, National Concerts, DCINY, AWR Music, etc.). The full fall 2026 query returns ~81 marquee-hall events; this fixture is seeded with the October marquee slate and should be expanded by re-running the query.
